Class NLPDetector

java.lang.Object
com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.NLPDetector
All Implemented Interfaces:
PIIDetector
public final class NLPDetector extends Object implements PIIDetector
PII detector backed by Apache OpenNLP Named Entity Recognition.

Supplements the HeuristicDetector and MLDetector with a proper Maximum Entropy (MaxEnt) NER model trained on large corpora. OpenNLP understands multi-token person names ("John Michael Smith"), compound organisation names ("Barclays Bank PLC"), and names that appear in varied syntactic positions — cases that trip up the bag-of-words Naive Bayes layer.

Detected types

  • PIIType.PERSON_NAME — from en-ner-person.bin
  • PIIType.ORGANIZATION — from en-ner-organization.bin (only if that model was loaded)

Thread safety

NameFinderME maintains per-call adaptive data that accumulates evidence across tokens in a document. It is not thread-safe. This class uses ThreadLocal to give each thread its own NameFinderME wrapper (initialized lazily from the shared, immutable TokenNameFinderModel). Adaptive data is cleared after every detect(String) call so no state bleeds between requests.

With Java 17+ virtual threads each virtual thread gets its own wrapper instance; since NameFinderME is lightweight (it holds only adaptive state), the per-thread overhead is negligible.

Since:
1.1.0
Author:
Hemant Naik

  • Constructor Details

    • NLPDetector

      public NLPDetector(NLPModelLoader.LoadedModels models, double minProbability)
      Creates an NLPDetector from pre-loaded OpenNLP models.
      Parameters:
      models - models loaded via NLPModelLoader (never null)
      minProbability - minimum OpenNLP entity probability to accept as a match; entities with probability below this value are discarded

  • Method Details

    • name

      public String name()
      Description copied from interface: PIIDetector
      Returns a short human-readable name used in logging and metrics (e.g. "HeuristicDetector", "NaiveBayesMLDetector").
      Specified by:
      name in interface PIIDetector

    • detect

      public List<PIIMatch> detect(String text)
      Runs OpenNLP NER on text and returns all person-name and organisation-name spans that meet the configured probability threshold.

      Adaptive data is cleared after each call so no state leaks between requests. The method is safe to call concurrently from many threads.

      Specified by:
      detect in interface PIIDetector
      Parameters:
      text - the input text (never null)
      Returns:
      mutable list of PII matches; empty if none found
